entity.summary: Solana-based decentralized trading platform that began as a liquidity-routing swap aggregator and expanded into an exchange product suite including perpetual futures. HEI models Jupiter as one entity rather than splitting its swap, limit-order, DCA, and perpetual products into separate exchanges.
entity.notes: Launch date is month-level and represents the public Jupiter exchange/aggregator era. Product modules and versions are not separate HEI entities.

events.title: Jupiter launched as a Solana liquidity-routing exchange
events.description: Jupiter entered public operation as a Solana swap-routing and liquidity-aggregation venue and later expanded into a broader decentralized trading platform.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker; no exact day is asserted.

evidence.title: Jupiter official trading application
evidence.notes: Current official application confirming active exchange operation.

evidence.title: Jupiter Support Center
evidence.notes: Official support documentation covering Jupiter swap and perpetual exchange products.

evidence.title: Jupiter protocol profile
evidence.notes: Independent protocol-directory corroboration used for discovery and active-status context.
